case_title: ALITA, TARCESIO P vs. RANCON CORP(A CALIF CORP)DBA RANCON CONTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALITA, TARCESIO P AS TO DEFENDANT RANCON CORP(A CALIF CORP)DBA RANCON CONTRUCTION
